title: Dynamic
subtitle: Occupancy-based pricing for {{hotel}}
guardrailDesc: In auto-apply mode the engine refuses to write a price that deviates from base by more than this cap — that swing gets flagged for manual review instead. Prevents a bad rule from silently 10×’ing the rate.
kpiNoDiscounts: No discounts applied yet this month
engineModeDesc: In Recommend-only mode the engine suggests a price but never writes. Switch to Auto-apply only once you trust the rules — the engine will then update live rates on its own.
discountCapDesc: Hard cap on how much percentage off a manager can give at walk-in. The server rejects any per-room discount above this — defense against a buggy client or a misclick. Recommended: 50% to start, tighten as you build trust.
guardrailEngaged: Guardrail engaged — auto-apply will refuse this swing
guardrailDeviateB: , which exceeds the configured cap of
guardrailDeviateC: You can still apply it manually below after reviewing.
evalHint: Enter a base price and click Evaluate to see the recommendation.
linkCalendarSub: 30-day grid view. Edit prices inline or in bulk.
linkPlansSub: Base prices, meal plans, seasonal rates, corporate tiers.
linkRulesSub: Occupancy-based dynamic adjustments on top of rate plans.
linkHistorySub: Full audit log of every price change.
